title: Create helper methods in PyTorch backend
description: Create _prepare_inputs(), _run_inference(), and _convert_to_results() helper methods in reranker_pytorch.py

title: Refactor PyTorch to use BatchProcessor
description: Refactor rerank() in reranker_pytorch.py to use BatchProcessor.process_batched_rerank()

title: Run full test suite
description: Run pytest on test_reranker.py, test_mlx_reranker.py, and test_integration.py to ensure no regressions

title: Batch Processing Refactoring
description: Refactor batch processing logic in reranker_pytorch.py and reranker_mlx.py to remove async complexity, eliminate duplication, and create shared batch processor module. Reduces PyTorch backend from 567 to ≤180 lines and MLX from 723 to ≤220 lines.

title: Remove concurrent batch config
description: Remove max_concurrent_batches parameter from BatchManager.__init__() and _get_env_max_concurrent() method

title: Reliable Test Suite After Refactoring
description: As a developer running tests, all existing tests must pass, and new unit tests for batch processor should provide good coverage.

title: Create BatchProcessor class
description:
Create src/local_reranker/batch_processor.py with BatchProcessor class containing shared batch processing logic.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Create batch_processor.py file
- [ ] Implement BatchProcessor class with static methods
- [ ] Implement _convert_scores_to_results() static method
- [ ] Implement process_batched_rerank() static method
- [ ] Add proper type hints and docstrings
- [ ] Run: ruff check src/local_reranker/batch_processor.py

title: Remove async method from reranker.py protocol
description:
Remove rerank_async() and rerank_async_final() method definitions from reranker.py protocol (lines 34-56).

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Remove rerank_async() method signature (lines 34-45)
- [ ] Remove rerank_async_final() method signature (lines 47-56)
- [ ] Remove unused AsyncGenerator import
- [ ] Protocol class still defines rerank() method
- [ ] Run: ruff check src/local_reranker/reranker.py

title: Create helper methods in MLX backend
description: Create _prepare_inputs(), _run_inference(), and _convert_to_results() helper methods in reranker_mlx.py

title: Deprecate ResultAggregator
description: Mark ResultAggregator class as deprecated with DeprecationWarning in result_aggregator.py

title: Create BatchProcessor unit tests
description:
Create tests/test_batch_processor.py with comprehensive unit tests for BatchProcessor methods.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Create test file tests/test_batch_processor.py
- [ ] Test _convert_scores_to_results() method
- [ ] Test process_batched_rerank() method
- [ ] Achieve 80%+ code coverage
- [ ] All tests pass: pytest tests/test_batch_processor.py -v
- [ ] Run: pytest --cov=src/local_reranker/batch_processor tests/test_batch_processor.py

title: Easy Onboarding for New Developers
description: As a new developer learning the codebase, I should see a shared batch processing module that I can reuse, minimal code in each backend, and clear separation of concerns.

title: Phase 3: Extract Commonality
description: Create BatchProcessor class with shared batch processing logic, refactor both backends to use it. Eliminates ~200+ lines of duplicated code.

title: Refactor PyTorch rerank() method
description: Refactor rerank() method in reranker_pytorch.py to use new helper methods and simple list operations, remove ResultAggregator usage

title: Clean up async imports
description:
Remove AsyncGenerator and asyncio imports from models.py, reranker_pytorch.py, reranker_mlx.py, and reranker.py after async code removal.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Remove AsyncGenerator from models.py imports
- [ ] Remove AsyncGenerator from reranker.py imports  
- [ ] Remove AsyncGenerator from reranker_pytorch.py imports
- [ ] Remove AsyncGenerator from reranker_mlx.py imports
- [ ] Remove asyncio import if no longer used in each file
- [ ] Run: ruff check src/local_reranker/

title: Phase 4: Simplify BatchManager
description: Remove max_concurrent_batches parameter and methods from BatchManager, keep GPU memory-based batch size calculation and simple batch creation logic.

title: Remove ProgressUpdate model
description:
Remove ProgressUpdate model class from models.py (lines 61-75).

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Remove ProgressUpdate dataclass
- [ ] Remove unused imports (AsyncGenerator if only used here)
- [ ] Verify no other files import ProgressUpdate
- [ ] Run: grep -r ProgressUpdate src/ (should return no results)
- [ ] Run: ruff check src/local_reranker/models.py

title: Remove async methods from MLX backend
description:
Remove rerank_async() (lines 372-596) and rerank_async_final() (lines 598-722) from reranker_mlx.py.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Remove rerank_async() method (lines 372-596)
- [ ] Remove rerank_async_final() method (lines 598-722)
- [ ] Remove unused AsyncGenerator import
- [ ] File size reduced by ~200+ lines

title: Clean up BatchManager references
description: Remove max_concurrent_batches from get_status(), logger messages, and reranker backends' __init__ calls

title: Update documentation
description: Update README.md to remove async support mentions, create MIGRATION.md documenting breaking changes

title: Phase 5: Testing and Documentation
description: Add unit tests for BatchProcessor, run full test suite, update README and create migration guide, run performance benchmarks.

title: Clear and Simple Batch Processing Code
description: As a developer maintaining the codebase, I should see clear, simple batch processing logic in reranker files, not 500+ lines of duplicated complex batching code.

title: Validate code reduction and performance
description:
Verify code reduction targets met and run benchmarks to confirm no performance regression.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] PyTorch backend ≤180 lines (was 567)
- [ ] MLX backend ≤220 lines (was 723)
- [ ] Run line count: wc -l src/local_reranker/reranker_pytorch.py src/local_reranker/reranker_mlx.py
- [ ] Run benchmarks comparing before/after performance
- [ ] GPU vectorization performance maintained or improved
- [ ] Run ruff: ruff check src/local_reranker/
- [ ] Run mypy: mypy src/local_reranker/

title: Remove async methods from PyTorch backend
description:
Remove rerank_async() (lines 256-439) and rerank_async_final() (lines 441-566) from reranker_pytorch.py.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Remove rerank_async() method (lines 256-439)
- [ ] Remove rerank_async_final() method (lines 441-566)
- [ ] Remove unused AsyncGenerator import
- [ ] File size reduced by ~200+ lines
- [ ] Run: ruff check src/local_reranker/reranker_pytorch.py

title: Phase 1: Remove Unused Async Complexity
description: Remove async method definitions from protocol and implementations in both backends, clean up ProgressUpdate model and unused async imports. Removes ~340 lines of unused code.

title: Refactor MLX to use BatchProcessor
description: Refactor rerank() in reranker_mlx.py to use BatchProcessor.process_batched_rerank()

title: Refactor MLX rerank() method
description: Refactor rerank() method in reranker_mlx.py to use new helper methods and simple list operations, remove ResultAggregator usage

title: Phase 2: Simplify Core Processing
description: Refactor rerank() methods to sequential processing only, create helper methods for input preparation/inference/result conversion, replace ResultAggregator with simple list operations.

title: Maintained Performance After Refactoring
description: As a developer using the API, rerank requests should process with the same or better performance (GPU vectorization maintained), and results should be identical to before refactoring.
